notes: Awaiting hand-keyed values from the named public source. AIP publishes weekly national average retail petrol and diesel reports only as PDF under aip.com.au/sites/default/files/download-files/<yyyy-mm>/Weekly%20<Product>%20Prices%20Report%20-%20<dd>%20<Month>%20<yyyy>.pdf. No CSV, XLSX, or JSON equivalent is exposed. PDF parsing is out of scope for the current fetcher runtime (stdlib + requests + pyyaml only). When populated: copy the national weighted-average c/L from the AIP weekly PDF, keep manual_entry true, set retrieved_at to the data-entry timestamp, and set status to ok.
